package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsSplitTwoIndexOneCut() string {
    ruleID := "strings_split_two_index_one_cut"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.Split(...)[1]` when only the second segment is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
